summary: Tested new Open Events and Cut-off Scores features. All 31 backend tests passed (18 existing + 13 new). Frontend pages for Open Events, Cut-off Scores, and Admin all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Open events seeded via POST /api/seed-open-events (7 events from TWGGS, Judd School, Skinners' School). Cut-off scores seeded via POST /api/seed-cut-off-scores (2 scores for Judd and Skinners')
context_for_next_testing_agent: New test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_open_events_cutoff.py covering: Open Events CRUD (create/read/filter/delete), Cut-off Scores CRUD, Scrape School Page endpoint, and data quality tests. All seeded data verified in database.

open_events_api.seeded_data: 7 events from TWGGS, Judd School, Skinners' School

cut_off_scores_api.seeded_data: 2 scores for Judd School (389/403) and Skinners' School (372/384)

scrape_helper_api.details: POST /api/scrape-school-page extracts dates, times, scores from school websites using httpx and BeautifulSoup

open_events_page.details: Events grouped by month, school filter, event cards with date/time/headteacher speaks info, 'View on school website' links

cut_off_scores_page.details: Year filter (2026 default), score cards showing Inner/Outer Area Cut-offs, Governors' Places, Total Offers, Notes, Source links

admin_page.details: Three tabs: Open Events (7), Cut-off Scores (2), Scrape Helper. Forms for adding events/scores, existing data list with delete buttons

navigation.details: Open Events and Cut-off Scores links visible in main nav
